name: Bomberman
description: The maze-bombing arcade classic in its original style on a wide scrolling Canvas arena (31x15, larger than the screen — it scrolls as the hero walks). A lattice of solid pillars between destructible bricks, bombs that burst in a cross of flame and chain off each other, power-ups hidden under bricks (extra fire range, extra bombs), wandering enemies and a hidden exit. The whole game advances on one actor that repaints off the event loop. Hold the D-pad to walk, tap BOMB or the field to drop a bomb.
